design_vision.core_philosophy: Elite Athleticism & Precision. Dark, moody, high-contrast. No 'friendly' rounded corners—sharp, tactical, effective.

scale.h1: text-6xl md:text-8xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase leading-none
scale.label: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-zinc-500

typography.instructions: Import 'Barlow Condensed' and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts. Use Barlow for all headings to give that 'sports magazine' feel. Use Inter for body copy.

colors.rules: Never use pure black (#000000). Use Zinc-950 (#09090B). Use Blue for primary actions/brand, Green for positive data (charts), Red for error/destructive.

layout_strategy.spacing: Relaxed. Section padding should be py-24 or py-32.
layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A). Mix of col-span-12, col-span-8, col-span-4. Asymmetric layouts are mandatory.
layout_strategy.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). Sharp edges convey precision.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-500 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-all hover:translate-x-1 hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#ffffff]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-white hover:border-white hover:bg-white/5 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none px-8 py-4

cards.style: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md rounded-sm hover:border-blue-500/50 transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden
cards.highlight: Add a glowing spotlight effect on hover.

navbar.style: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5 h-20 flex items-center

hero.layout: Split Layout (Left Text, Right 3D Visual) or Center Heavy.
hero.headline: MANAGE YOUR STUDIO LIKE A PRO
hero.subheadline: The all-in-one platform for workouts, diet plans, and membership management. Built for high-performance fitness businesses.
hero.visual: A tilted, floating dashboard card showing a 'Revenue Graph' or 'Member Activity' chart using Recharts.

items.title: Workout Tracking
items.visual: Interactive graph or image of trainer

items.title: Member Management
items.visual: Member list UI with status tags

pricing.layout: Three vertical cards. Center card 'Pro' highlighted with Neon Blue border and glow.

testimonials.content: Real gym owners praising the efficiency.

contact.layout: Minimal form on the left, office/gym location map or moody image on the right.

installation_steps: npm install framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge lucide-react recharts
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Do not use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Stick to rounded-sm or rounded-none for this brand.
Use data-testid on all buttons and inputs.
Ensure high contrast for text (White on Black).
